work_summary: Merged the landing page redesign into main after implementing the refreshed public-facing layout, fixing responsive-navigation/public-link review findings, and completing targeted frontend verification.
priority_actions: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_LINE_ADD_FRIEND_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_PRIVACY_POLICY_URL in deployed frontend environments so public CTAs resolve to real destinations
Run screenshot/manual QA on the merged landing page across desktop and mobile breakpoints
Delete feat/landing-page-redesign locally/remotely when branch cleanup is desired
context_for_next_agent: main is clean and now includes PR #14. The landing page uses config-aware public links in frontend/lib/public-links.ts; without NEXT_PUBLIC_LINE_ADD_FRIEND_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_PRIVACY_POLICY_URL it falls back to contact/section anchors instead of dead '#'. Targeted frontend ESLint and a full production build passed after the final fixes.

cross_platform_read.key_insight: CI on main is green after Alembic and pytest fixes
Live-chat hardening is complete but manual QA still remains
SESSION_INDEX and universal handoff artifacts are mandatory cross-platform glue

commits.message: feat(frontend): redesign landing page branding and layout
fix(frontend): improve landing navigation and link fallbacks

verification: wsl.exe -e bash -lc "cd /mnt/d/genAI/jsk-app/frontend && npx eslint app/page.tsx components/landing/LandingNavbar.tsx components/landing/LandingLineSection.tsx components/landing/LandingFooter.tsx lib/i18n/landing.ts lib/public-links.ts"
